title: thymus serpylloides subsp. gadorensis
intro: Thymus serpylloides subsp. gadorensis, also known as the Iberian Thyme or Spanish Thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus serpyllum plant, a low-growing, flowering herb native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Thymus serpylloides subsp. gadorensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or essential oil, which can be used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
